titleStmt.title: SII 24.81: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 81. (A.R. No. 129 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by the peruṅguṟi-sabhā of the Rājāśraya-chaturvē dimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam, a sub-division of Rājamahēndravaḷanāḍu, for a flower garden and repairs to the temple of Tiruvaraṅgadēva. The sabhā is said to have been convened in the Rājēndraśōḻan maṇḍapa in their village and the number of members present counted before beginning its deliberations. Dated in the 34th regnal year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī pukaḻ ḥ § mātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nila makaḷ nilava malar makaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi miṉavar nilai keṭa villavar kulaitara yeṉai maṉṉava ririyaluṟṟuḻitara tikkaṉaittum taṉ cakkara naṭātti vīrasiṅhāsaṉattu puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirācakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkara vattikaḷ
śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4 I muppattu nālāvatu rājamahemdravaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīrājāśrayac caturvedimaṅgalattup peruṅkuṟi ssabhaiyom Eṅkaḷuril rājendracoḻaṉ maṇṭapatte kūṭṭaṅkoṭṭip puḷḷi vācittuk kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu paṇippap paṇiyāl paṇittut tiruvaraṅka tevarkku tiruna
ṉtavaṉamākavum tiruppaṇikkuṭalākavum kuṭutta puṉceyum malaiyuṅ kuṭṭamumāvatu . nammūr kiḻpiṭākai rājendracoḻap periḷamai nāṭṭu vaṭavūril kaliṅkoṭi Akaḻukku vaṭakkum kiḻakkum ciṟṟamparellaikkut teṟkum Ic ciṟṟamparkku nir pāykiṟa vāykkālukku meṟkum Āka Icainta Innāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa puṉceyyum malaiyum kuṭṭamum ni 10 3 mā3ma ¿ Innilam patiṉmuṉ
ṟumāmukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum tiruvaraṅkatevar tirukkaimmalarile nīr vāttukkuṭuttu Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭik koḷḷak kaṭavatāka pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom peruṅkuṟi ssabhaiyom . tiruvaṭi paṇiyāl Ivvūr maddhyasthaṉ nantimaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ ciṟiyāṉ nālāyiravaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ūr vāriyam Araṇaip puṟattu nākatevakramavittaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ippaṭikku kārampicceṭṭu cakkarapāṇipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉāṉa cirā paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku I ṇṭinātatevakramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku pāratāyaṉjhavyavāhanaṉ tirunilakaṇṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku paciṇṭippuṟattu piccatevakramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
kumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kavucikaṉ ciṅkappirāṉ śrī kaṇṭa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku naṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ viḻumiya teva kramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku pāratāyaṉ cūriyatevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kāṟkiyaṉ tirumaḻapāṭi Ātitta paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku
ntaṉ kramavittaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kārampiceṭṭu cirāma devapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku cura Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku nūṟṟilāmpuṟattu śrī kayilāsakramavittaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Arivāḻpākkattu tirunārāyaṇakramavitta ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kalvakkūr śrīkraṣṇa paṭṭaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku kurovai
sraṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku ṟṟuṟai Aṉantakramavittaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku pāratāyaṉ Aṉantaṉ cantiracekara paṭṭa ṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭi kku kataṉ nārāyaṇaṉ Aṉantaṉeḻuttu . Ippaṭikku pārattuvāci ciṅkap pirāṉ ciriḷaṅkopaṭṭaṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 24.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
